question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists three main sections of the thesis: Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija, Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi, Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section. However, it could benefit from more specific details about what will be covered in each section.

question: Structure
feedback: Yes, it is clear that the thesis will have an introduction with three main parts and that each part will be described in more detail later. The structure is well-defined.
